ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* A brief description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "difficulty_rating" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating of the problem (1-10) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the problem was created */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the problem for categorization */,
  "problem_statement" TEXT /* Detailed problem statement */,
  "example_input" TEXT /* Example input for the problem */,
  "example_output" TEXT /* Example output for the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the solution */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem being solved */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "code" TEXT /* Actual code submitted by the user */,
  "submission_time" REAL /* Time taken by the submission to execute */,
  "submission_memory" INTEGER /* Memory used by the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose rating is recorded */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the user */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the rating was recorded */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., Overall, Contest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose rank is recorded */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user based on their performance */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the ranking was recorded */,
  "ranking_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., Overall, Contest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problems_solved" (
  "solved_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solved problem record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who solved the problem */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem that was solved */,
  "solved_date" TEXT /* Date the problem was solved */,
  "num_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts taken to solve the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solved_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_solved_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_solved_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contest_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who participated in the contest */,
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contest entered */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the user in the contest */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the user in the contest */,
  "num_problems_solved" INTEGER /* Number of problems solved by the user in the contest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_participation_contest_id FOREIGN KEY ("contest_id") REFERENCES contests ("contest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contest_participation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contests" (
  "contest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contest */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contest */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contest */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contest (e.g., Upcoming, Ongoing, Completed) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the contest in minutes */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contest (e.g., Rated, Unrated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the programming language available */,
  "compiler_version" TEXT /* Version of the compiler used to compile the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., Submission, Contest Participation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the badge represents */,
  "badge_image" TEXT /* URL of the badge image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "user_badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user badge record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the badge earned */,
  "date_earned" TEXT /* Date when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_badge_id FOREIGN KEY ("badge_id") REFERENCES badges ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the problem category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the problem category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_category_map" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the problem belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tutorials" (
  "tutorial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tutorial */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the tutorial is for */,
  "tutorial_url" TEXT /* URL of the tutorial resource */,
  "tutorial_description" TEXT /* Description of the tutorial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tutorial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tutorials_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hints" (
  "hint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hint */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the hint is for */,
  "hint_text" TEXT /* Text of the hint */,
  "hint_order" INTEGER /* Order of the hint in the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hints_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum post */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem the post is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum post the reply is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_replies_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)
